title: When Gary Left Annie Almost
company: date. Gary adores Annie but he absolutely has to leave her. Annie "quite likes" Gary but really shouldn't have ever entered a relationship with him in the first place. It's obvious to everyone that they need to part ways, but sometimes real life just gets in the way; why would you dump somebody you're still so, well, 'comfortable' with?
description: Helen Pain - writer/performerPaul Richards - writer/performerAlan Morgan - audio design Company:Shoulder Cat Productions(Website)

reviews.excerpt: Genre: Comedy , Fringe Theatre , New Writing , Radio Play , Theatre Helen Pain and Paul Richards write and perform this intimate two-hander about two very ordinary people navigating love, adulthood and couplehood  –  with self-awareness, sharp observation and a bit of dancing.
